title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE ONTARIO SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers breast or cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 2327 SW 4th Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: -Ages 18-39 needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) regardless of gender -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services regardless of gender -Must live or intend to live in Oregon Household income at or below 250% federal poverty level -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Hours: Medical: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Saturday 8am-6pm Sunday noon-6pm Email (541) 889-2340 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-2340 Screenwise (971) 673-0581 FAX (541) 889-2593 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Medical: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm Saturday 8am-6pm Sunday noon-6pm Dental: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm Friday 8am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Bi-Mart and Joann's Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE ONTARIO
